structured_payload_candidate.title: AHU Mode Hierarchy
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When Zone Groups served by an air-handling system are in different modes, the highest mode in the hierarchy sets the AHU mode.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone Groups served by an air-handling system are in different modes.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: The highest mode in the hierarchy (Occupied > Cooldown > Setup > Warmup > Setback > Unoccupied) sets the AHU mode.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: When Zone Group served by an air -handling system are in diffe rent modes, the following hierarchy applies (highest one sets AHU mode ): a. Occupied Mode b. Cooldown Mode c. Setup Mode d. Warmup Mode e. Setback Mode f. Unoccupied Mode

evidence_quote: When Zone Group served by an air -handling system are in diffe rent modes, the following hierarchy applies (highest one sets AHU mode ): a. Occupied Mode b. Cooldown Mode c. Setup Mode d. Warmup Mode e. Setback Mode f. Unoccupied Mode
evidence_text: When Zone Group served by an air -handling system are in diffe rent modes, the following hierarchy applies (highest one sets AHU mode ): a. Occupied Mode b. Cooldown Mode c. Setup Mode d. Warmup Mode e. Setback Mode f. Unoccupied Mode
